backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that includes blob storage mixin and provides CRUD operations for services (add, get, update, delete) and returns static business information for Bodyshape Fitness in Dallas, TX.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of 12 facility photos with 6 enhanced images in the ImageGallery component, with high confidence and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and configuration files for the Bodyshape Fitness application with updated branding and location details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with neutral grayscale palette and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags for Bodyshape Fitness personal training in Dallas, TX, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining root route with Layout wrapper and child routes for Home (/) and Locations (/locations) pages.
Audio player component with play/pause, mute, and volume controls that persists user preferences to localStorage and plays royalty-free workout music from Bensound.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: Gallery component displaying 6 enhanced facility images in a responsive grid with hover effects and modal dialog for enlarged views with titles and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header, Bodyshape Fitness branding, responsive navigation with mobile menu, BackgroundMusic integration, and footer with Kentucky location details and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LocationCard.tsx: React component that displays a gym location's details (name, address, phone, hours) in a card layout with icons from lucide-react.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: React component that renders a grid of customer reviews with star ratings, using review data imported from a separate data file.
frontend/src/data/reviews.ts: TypeScript data file exporting an array of six 5-star customer reviews with reviewer names, ratings, text, and dates.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor, handling both authenticated and anonymous identities with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file for React Query hooks that would interact with the backend; currently exports nothing as no backend queries are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a dark grey/black background theme with gold accent colors for both light and dark modes, plus Google Fonts imports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero section with background image, manager profile section for Allen D., info cards, image gallery, and testimonials section.
frontend/src/pages/Locations.tsx: Locations page displaying gym location details, embedded Google Maps, and contact information (phone, email, address, hours) for Bodyshape Fitness in Independence, KY.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, Inter/Bebas Neue fonts, container settings, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Bodyshape Fitness' tracking a single feature request to replace 12 facility photos in ImageGallery with 6 specific uploaded enhanced images.
